/** * Adds this duration to the given instant, returning a new Instant. *

* To add just once, pass in a scalar of one. To subtract once, pass * in a scalar of minus one. * * @param instant the instant to add the duration to * @param scalar the number of times to add the duration, negative to subtract * @return instant with the original value plus this duration times scalar * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the instant is null * @throws ArithmeticException if the result of the calculation is too large */
